zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne Huffer Bokinge於1415年出生在英國素福爾可時，她的父親Edward Bokinge20歲，母親Lady Bokinge of Ashbokinge21歲。她和Sir William Perot Latimer至少有6個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1437年在她的家鄉享年22歲。

nameMeanings.name: Huffer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: possibly a variant of   Hufford  , itself a variant of   Ufford  .
English and Welsh: perhaps a variant of   Hovey  .
German (Hüffer): from the ancient Germanic personal name Hugifrid, composed of the elements hug ‘head, mind, spirit’ + frid ‘peace’.

variants.name: Hufford
meanings: English (Huntingdonshire): variant of Ufford with inorganic H-.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne Huffer Bokinge was born in 1415, in Suffolk, England, her father, Edward Bokinge, was 20 and her mother, Lady Bokinge of Ashbokinge, was 21. She had at least 6 sons and 6 daughters with Sir William Perot Latimer. She died in 1437, in her hometown, at the age of 22.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne Huffer Bokinge est née en 1415, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Edward Bokinge, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Bokinge of Ashbokinge, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles avec Sir William Perot Latimer. Elle est décédée en 1437, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 22 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Huffer Bokinge è nata il nel 1415 nel Suffolk, England, sua padre, Edward Bokinge, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Lady Bokinge of Ashbokinge, aveva 21 anni. ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Huffer Bokinge(이)가 1415년 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Bokinge(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Bokinge of Ashbokinge(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Sir William Perot Latimer(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1437년 그녀의 고향에서 22세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne Huffer Bokinge родилась в 1415 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Edward Bokinge было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Bokinge of Ashbokinge, 21. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Sir William Perot Latimer. Она умерла в 1437 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 22 лет.
